args.code:
import pandas as pd
business_data = locals()['var_function-call-5342982829584467669']['results']
review_data = locals()['var_function-call-9094430677026830870']['results']

df_business = pd.DataFrame(business_data)
df_review = pd.DataFrame(review_data)

df_review['rating'] = df_review['rating'].astype(int)

merged_df = pd.merge(df_business, df_review, on='gmap_id')

average_ratings = merged_df.groupby('name')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
average_ratings = average_ratings.sort_values(by='rating', ascending=False)

top_5_businesses = average_ratings.head(5)

print('__RESULT__:')
print(top_5_businesses.to_json(orient='records'))
